# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: http-gateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway # use Istio's default ingress gateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: http-routing-example
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*" # Route for all hostnames. Can be specific like "yourdomain.com"
  gateways:
  - http-gateway # Binds this VirtualService to the Gateway defined above
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /api/v1/product
    route:
    - destination:
        host: productpage.default.svc.cluster.local # Your service name and namespace
        port:
          number: 9080 # The port your service is listening on
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /api/v1/reviews
    route:
    - destination:
        host: reviews.default.svc.cluster.local # Another service
        port:
          number: 9080
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: homepage.default.svc.cluster.local # Default catch-all service
        port:
          number: 80
